mule.xsi:schemaLocation: http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/db/current/mule-db.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/file/current/mule-file.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email/current/mule-email.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/tls/current/mule-tls.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/mule-apikit/current/mule-apikit.xsd

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Bad request: " ++ error.description, correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Resource not found", correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Method not allowed", correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Database temporarily unavailable. Please retry.", correlationId: correlationId }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Internal server error", correlationId: correlationId }

db:select.doc:name: Select policies with pagination
db:select.db:sql: SELECT policy_id, policy_number, holder_name, holder_email, policy_type, coverage_amount, premium, status, effective_date, expiration_date, created_at FROM policies WHERE status != 'DELETED' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT :pageSize OFFSET :offset

db:select.doc:name: Count total policies
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM policies WHERE status != 'DELETED'

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, count: sizeOf(vars.policies), totalCount: payload[0].total, page: vars.page as Number, pageSize: vars.pageSize as Number, totalPages: ceil(payload[0].total / (vars.pageSize as Number)), policies: vars.policies map { policyId: $.policy_id, policyNumber: $.policy_number, holderName: $.holder_name, holderEmail: $.holder_email, policyType: $.policy_type, coverageAmount: $.coverage_amount, premium: $.premium, status: $.status, effectiveDate: $.effective_date, expirationDate: $.expiration_date } }

scatter-gather.doc:name: Fetch policy data from multiple databases

db:select.doc:name: Select policy from Claims DB
db:select.db:sql: SELECT * FROM policies WHERE policy_id = :policyId

db:select.doc:name: Select claims for policy
db:select.db:sql: SELECT claim_id, claim_number, claim_type, claim_amount, approved_amount, status, filed_date, resolved_date FROM claims WHERE policy_id = :policyId ORDER BY filed_date DESC

db:select.doc:name: Select audit trail from Audit DB
db:select.db:sql: SELECT action, actor, details, created_at FROM audit_log WHERE entity_type = 'POLICY' AND entity_id = :policyId ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10

db:select.doc:name: Select documents from Documents DB
db:select.db:sql: SELECT document_id, document_name, document_type, file_path, file_size_bytes, uploaded_by, uploaded_at FROM claim_documents WHERE policy_id = :policyId AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var p = payload."0".payload[0] --- { success: true, policy: { policyId: p.policy_id, policyNumber: p.policy_number, holderName: p.holder_name, holderEmail: p.holder_email, policyType: p.policy_type, coverageAmount: p.coverage_amount, premium: p.premium, status: p.status, effectiveDate: p.effective_date, expirationDate: p.expiration_date }, claimsHistory: payload."1".payload map { claimId: $.claim_id, claimNumber: $.claim_number, claimType: $.claim_type, claimAmount: $.claim_amount, approvedAmount: $.approved_amount, status: $.status, filedDate: $.filed_date, resolvedDate: $.resolved_date }, auditTrail: payload."2".payload map { action: $.action, actor: $.actor, details: $.details, timestamp: $.created_at }, documents: payload."3".payload map { documentId: $.document_id, documentName: $.document_name, documentType: $.document_type, filePath: $.file_path, fileSizeBytes: $.file_size_bytes, uploadedBy: $.uploaded_by, uploadedAt: $.uploaded_at } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Policy not found" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload

db:insert.doc:name: Insert policy into Claims DB
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO policies (policy_number, holder_name, holder_email, policy_type, coverage_amount, premium, status, effective_date, expiration_date) VALUES (:policyNumber, :holderName, :holderEmail, :policyType, :coverageAmount, :premium, 'ACTIVE', :effectiveDate, :expirationDate)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ policyNumber: vars.policyData.policyNumber, holderName: vars.policyData.holderName, holderEmail: vars.policyData.holderEmail, policyType: vars.policyData.policyType, coverageAmount: vars.policyData.coverageAmount, premium: vars.policyData.premium, effectiveDate: vars.policyData.effectiveDate, expirationDate: vars.policyData.expirationDate }]

db:select.doc:name: Get new policy ID
db:select.db:sql: SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as new_id

db:insert.doc:name: Insert audit log
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at) VALUES ('POLICY', :entityId, 'CREATED', :actor, :details, NOW())

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Policy created successfully", policyId: vars.newPolicyId, policyNumber: vars.policyData.policyNumber }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload

db:select.doc:name: Check policy exists
db:select.db:sql: SELECT policy_id, status FROM policies WHERE policy_id = :policyId

db:update.doc:name: Update policy
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE policies SET holder_name = :holderName, holder_email = :holderEmail, coverage_amount = :coverageAmount, premium = :premium, updated_at = NOW() WHERE policy_id = :policyId
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ policyId: vars.policyId, holderName: vars.updateData.holderName, holderEmail: vars.updateData.holderEmail, coverageAmount: vars.updateData.coverageAmount, premium: vars.updateData.premium }]

db:insert.doc:name: Audit update
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at) VALUES ('POLICY', :entityId, 'UPDATED', 'api-user', :details, NOW())

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Policy updated successfully" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Policy not found" }

db:select.doc:name: Check open claims
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as open_claims FROM claims WHERE policy_id = :policyId AND status IN ('SUBMITTED', 'UNDER_REVIEW')

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Cannot delete policy with open claims. Resolve all claims first." }

db:update.doc:name: Soft delete policy
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE policies SET status = 'DELETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE policy_id = :policyId

db:insert.doc:name: Audit deletion
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at) VALUES ('POLICY', :entityId, 'DELETED', 'api-user', 'Policy soft-deleted', NOW())

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Policy deleted successfully" }

db:select.doc:name: Select all claims with join
db:select.db:sql: SELECT c.claim_id, c.claim_number, c.policy_id, p.policy_number, c.claimant_name, c.claim_type, c.description, c.claim_amount, c.approved_amount, c.status, c.filed_date, c.resolved_date, p.holder_name, p.policy_type, p.coverage_amount FROM claims c JOIN policies p ON c.policy_id = p.policy_id WHERE (c.status = :statusFilter OR :statusFilter = 'ALL') ORDER BY c.filed_date DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, count: sizeOf(payload), filter: vars.statusFilter, claims: payload map { claimId: $.claim_id, claimNumber: $.claim_number, policyId: $.policy_id, policyNumber: $.policy_number, holderName: $.holder_name, claimantName: $.claimant_name, claimType: $.claim_type, description: $.description, claimAmount: $.claim_amount, approvedAmount: $.approved_amount, status: $.status, filedDate: $.filed_date, resolvedDate: $.resolved_date, policyType: $.policy_type, coverageAmount: $.coverage_amount } }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload

db:select.doc:name: Validate active policy
db:select.db:sql: SELECT policy_id, policy_number, status, coverage_amount, holder_name, holder_email FROM policies WHERE policy_id = :policyId AND status = 'ACTIVE'

db:insert.doc:name: Insert claim
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO claims (claim_number, policy_id, claimant_name, claim_type, description, claim_amount, status, filed_date) VALUES (:claimNumber, :policyId, :claimantName, :claimType, :description, :claimAmount, 'SUBMITTED', CURDATE())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ claimNumber: vars.claimNumber, policyId: vars.claimData.policyId, claimantName: vars.claimData.claimantName, claimType: vars.claimData.claimType, description: vars.claimData.description, claimAmount: vars.claimData.claimAmount }]

db:select.doc:name: Get new claim ID
db:select.db:sql: SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() as new_id

db:insert.doc:name: Audit claim creation
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at) VALUES ('CLAIM', :entityId, 'FILED', :actor, :details, NOW())

db:insert.doc:name: Create document placeholder in Documents DB
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO claim_documents (policy_id, claim_id, document_name, document_type, file_path, uploaded_by, uploaded_at) VALUES (:policyId, :claimId, :docName, 'CLAIM_FORM', :filePath, :uploadedBy, GETDATE())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ policyId: vars.claimData.policyId, claimId: vars.newClaimId, docName: "Claim_" ++ vars.claimNumber ++ "_form.pdf", filePath: "/claims/" ++ (vars.newClaimId as String) ++ "/Claim_" ++ vars.claimNumber ++ "_form.pdf", uploadedBy: vars.claimData.claimantName }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Claim filed successfully", claimId: vars.newClaimId, claimNumber: vars.claimNumber, status: "SUBMITTED" }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Claim amount ($" ++ (vars.claimData.claimAmount as String) ++ ") exceeds policy coverage ($" ++ (vars.policyInfo.coverage_amount as String) ++ ")" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Policy not found or not active. Cannot file claim." }

db:select.doc:name: Select claim by ID
db:select.db:sql: SELECT c.*, p.policy_number, p.holder_name, p.holder_email, p.policy_type FROM claims c JOIN policies p ON c.policy_id = p.policy_id WHERE c.claim_id = :claimId

db:select.doc:name: Select claim documents
db:select.db:sql: SELECT document_id, document_name, document_type, file_path, file_size_bytes, uploaded_by, uploaded_at FROM claim_documents WHERE claim_id = :claimId AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC

db:select.doc:name: Select claim audit trail
db:select.db:sql: SELECT action, actor, details, created_at FROM audit_log WHERE entity_type = 'CLAIM' AND entity_id = :claimId ORDER BY created_at DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json var c = payload."0".payload[0] --- { success: true, claim: { claimId: c.claim_id, claimNumber: c.claim_number, policyNumber: c.policy_number, holderName: c.holder_name, holderEmail: c.holder_email, policyType: c.policy_type, claimantName: c.claimant_name, claimType: c.claim_type, description: c.description, claimAmount: c.claim_amount, approvedAmount: c.approved_amount, status: c.status, filedDate: c.filed_date, resolvedDate: c.resolved_date }, documents: payload."1".payload map { documentId: $.document_id, documentName: $.document_name, documentType: $.document_type, filePath: $.file_path, fileSizeBytes: $.file_size_bytes, uploadedBy: $.uploaded_by, uploadedAt: $.uploaded_at }, auditTrail: payload."2".payload map { action: $.action, actor: $.actor, details: $.details, timestamp: $.created_at } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Claim not found" }
%dw 2.0 output application/java --- payload

db:update.doc:name: Approve claim
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE claims SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_amount = :approvedAmount, resolved_date = CURDATE(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE claim_id = :claimId

db:insert.doc:name: Audit approval
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at) VALUES ('CLAIM', :entityId, 'APPROVED', 'claims-adjuster', :details, NOW())

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Claim approved successfully", status: "APPROVED" }

db:update.doc:name: Reject claim
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE claims SET status = 'REJECTED', approved_amount = 0, resolved_date = CURDATE(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE claim_id = :claimId

db:insert.doc:name: Audit rejection
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at) VALUES ('CLAIM', :entityId, 'REJECTED', 'claims-adjuster', :details, NOW())

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Claim rejected", status: "REJECTED" }

db:update.doc:name: Set under review
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE claims SET status = 'UNDER_REVIEW', updated_at = NOW() WHERE claim_id = :claimId

db:insert.doc:name: Audit review start
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at) VALUES ('CLAIM', :entityId, 'REVIEW_STARTED', 'claims-adjuster', 'Claim moved to under review', NOW())

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, message: "Claim moved to under review", status: "UNDER_REVIEW" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Invalid status. Use APPROVED, REJECTED, or UNDER_REVIEW." }

db:select.doc:name: Verify claim exists
db:select.db:sql: SELECT claim_id, policy_id, claim_number FROM claims WHERE claim_id = :claimId

file:write.doc:name: Write PDF to Azure File Share

db:insert.doc:name: Record document metadata
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO claim_documents (policy_id, claim_id, document_name, document_type, file_path, file_size_bytes, uploaded_by, uploaded_at) VALUES (:policyId, :claimId, :docName, :docType, :filePath, :fileSize, :uploadedBy, GETDATE())
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ policyId: vars.claimInfo.policy_id, claimId: vars.claimId, docName: vars.fileName, docType: if (vars.fileName endsWith ".pdf") "PDF" else if (vars.fileName endsWith ".jpg" or vars.fileName endsWith ".png") "IMAGE" else "OTHER", filePath: vars.filePath, fileSize: sizeOf(vars.fileContent), uploadedBy: attributes.headers.'x-uploaded-by' default "api-user" }]

db:insert.doc:name: Audit document upload
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO audit_log (entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at) VALUES ('DOCUMENT', :entityId, 'UPLOADED', :actor, :details, NOW())

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Claim not found" }

db:select.doc:name: Get document metadata
db:select.db:sql: SELECT document_id, document_name, document_type, file_path FROM claim_documents WHERE document_id = :documentId AND claim_id = :claimId AND is_deleted = 0

file:read.doc:name: Read PDF from Azure File Share

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Document not found" }

db:select.doc:name: Select claim documents
db:select.db:sql: SELECT document_id, document_name, document_type, file_path, file_size_bytes, uploaded_by, uploaded_at FROM claim_documents WHERE claim_id = :claimId AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, count: sizeOf(payload), claimId: attributes.uriParams.claimId, documents: payload map { documentId: $.document_id, documentName: $.document_name, documentType: $.document_type, filePath: $.file_path, fileSizeBytes: $.file_size_bytes, uploadedBy: $.uploaded_by, uploadedAt: $.uploaded_at, downloadUrl: "/api/v1/claims/" ++ (attributes.uriParams.claimId as String) ++ "/documents/" ++ ($.document_id as String) } }

db:select.doc:name: Total claims
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_claims FROM claims

db:select.doc:name: Claims by status
db:select.db:sql: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count, COALESCE(SUM(claim_amount), 0) as total_amount FROM claims GROUP BY status

db:select.doc:name: Financial totals
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(claim_amount), 0) as total_claimed, COALESCE(SUM(approved_amount), 0) as total_approved, COALESCE(AVG(claim_amount), 0) as avg_claim FROM claims

db:select.doc:name: Active policies
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as active_policies, COALESCE(SUM(coverage_amount), 0) as total_coverage, COALESCE(SUM(premium), 0) as total_premiums FROM policies WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'

db:select.doc:name: Recent audit activity
db:select.db:sql: SELECT action, COUNT(*) as count FROM audit_log WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY action ORDER BY count DESC

db:select.doc:name: Document statistics
db:select.db:sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_documents, COALESCE(SUM(file_size_bytes), 0) as total_storage_bytes, COUNT(DISTINCT claim_id) as claims_with_docs FROM claim_documents WHERE is_deleted = 0

db:select.doc:name: Monthly claims summary
db:select.db:sql: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(filed_date, '%Y-%m') as month, claim_type, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(claim_amount) as total_amount, SUM(approved_amount) as total_approved FROM claims WHERE DATE_FORMAT(filed_date, '%Y-%m') = :month GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(filed_date, '%Y-%m'), claim_type ORDER BY count DESC

db:select.doc:name: Monthly new policies
db:select.db:sql: SELECT policy_type, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(coverage_amount) as total_coverage, SUM(premium) as total_premium FROM policies WHERE DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') = :month GROUP BY policy_type

db:select.doc:name: Top claimants
db:select.db:sql: SELECT claimant_name, COUNT(*) as claims_count, SUM(claim_amount) as total_claimed FROM claims WHERE DATE_FORMAT(filed_date, '%Y-%m') = :month GROUP BY claimant_name ORDER BY total_claimed DESC LIMIT 10

db:select.doc:name: Select audit log from Audit DB
db:select.db:sql: SELECT id, entity_type, entity_id, action, actor, details, created_at FROM audit_log WHERE created_at >= NOW() - CAST(:days || ' days' AS INTERVAL) AND (entity_type = :entityType OR :entityType = 'ALL') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

db:select.doc:name: Ping Claims DB
db:select.db:sql: SELECT 1 as ping

db:select.doc:name: Ping Audit DB
db:select.db:sql: SELECT 1 as ping

db:select.doc:name: Ping Documents DB
db:select.db:sql: SELECT 1 as ping

db:select.doc:name: Get claim details
db:select.db:sql: SELECT c.*, p.policy_number, p.holder_name, p.holder_email, p.policy_type FROM claims c JOIN policies p ON c.policy_id = p.policy_id WHERE c.claim_id = :claimId

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "restcountries.com", country: payload[0].name.common default "Unknown", capital: payload[0].capital[0] default "Unknown", region: payload[0].region default "Unknown", population: payload[0].population default 0, currencies: payload[0].currencies default {} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "restcountries.com", status: "unavailable", error: error.description }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "open.er-api.com", baseCurrency: "USD", claimAmountUSD: vars.claimDetails.claim_amount default 0, convertedAmounts: { EUR: (vars.claimDetails.claim_amount default 0) * (payload.rates.EUR default 0), GBP: (vars.claimDetails.claim_amount default 0) * (payload.rates.GBP default 0), CAD: (vars.claimDetails.claim_amount default 0) * (payload.rates.CAD default 0), INR: (vars.claimDetails.claim_amount default 0) * (payload.rates.INR default 0), JPY: (vars.claimDetails.claim_amount default 0) * (payload.rates.JPY default 0) }, lastUpdated: payload.time_last_update_utc default "unknown" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "open.er-api.com", status: "unavailable", error: error.description }

http:request.doc:name: Get weather data
http:request.http:query-params: #[output application/java --- { latitude: "40.7128", longitude: "-74.0060", current_weather: "true", daily: "temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min,precipitation_sum,windspeed_10m_max", timezone: "America/New_York", forecast_days: "3" }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "api.open-meteo.com", location: "New York, NY (default)", currentWeather: payload.current_weather default {}, dailyForecast: if (payload.daily != null) (payload.daily.time default []) map ((day, idx) -> { date: day, tempMax: (payload.daily.temperature_2m_max[idx]) default null, tempMin: (payload.daily.temperature_2m_min[idx]) default null, precipitation: (payload.daily.precipitation_sum[idx]) default null, windspeedMax: (payload.daily.windspeed_10m_max[idx]) default null }) else [], relevance: "Weather data can validate weather-related claims (storms, floods, hail)" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { source: "api.open-meteo.com", status: "unavailable", error: error.description }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, claimId: vars.claimId as Number, claimNumber: vars.claimDetails.claim_number default "N/A", policyNumber: vars.claimDetails.policy_number default "N/A", holderName: vars.claimDetails.holder_name default "N/A", claimAmount: vars.claimDetails.claim_amount default 0, enrichment: { countryData: payload."0".payload, currencyConversion: payload."1".payload, weatherData: payload."2".payload }, enrichedAt: now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'"} }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Claim not found", claimId: vars.claimId }

%dw 2.0 output application/json var rate = payload.rates[vars.toCurrency] default 0 --- { success: true, source: "open.er-api.com", from: vars.fromCurrency, to: vars.toCurrency, amount: vars.amount as Number, rate: rate, convertedAmount: (vars.amount as Number) * rate, lastUpdated: payload.time_last_update_utc default "unknown" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Currency conversion failed: " ++ error.description }

http:request.doc:name: Get weather forecast
http:request.http:query-params: #[output application/java --- { latitude: attributes.queryParams.latitude default "40.7128", longitude: attributes.queryParams.longitude default "-74.0060", current_weather: "true", daily: "temperature_2m_max,temperature_2m_min,precipitation_sum,windspeed_10m_max,weathercode", timezone: attributes.queryParams.timezone default "auto", forecast_days: attributes.queryParams.days default "7" }]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, source: "api.open-meteo.com", coordinates: { latitude: payload.latitude, longitude: payload.longitude }, timezone: payload.timezone default "unknown", currentWeather: payload.current_weather default {}, dailyForecast: if (payload.daily != null) (payload.daily.time default []) map ((day, idx) -> { date: day, tempMaxC: (payload.daily.temperature_2m_max[idx]) default null, tempMinC: (payload.daily.temperature_2m_min[idx]) default null, precipitationMm: (payload.daily.precipitation_sum[idx]) default null, windspeedMaxKmh: (payload.daily.windspeed_10m_max[idx]) default null, weatherCode: (payload.daily.weathercode[idx]) default null }) else [], usage: "Use for validating weather-related insurance claims (storms, floods, hail damage)" }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Weather API failed: " ++ error.description }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, source: "restcountries.com", results: payload map ((country) -> { name: country.name.common default "Unknown", officialName: country.name.official default "Unknown", capital: country.capital default [], region: country.region default "Unknown", subregion: country.subregion default "Unknown", population: country.population default 0, currencies: country.currencies default {}, languages: country.languages default {}, timezones: country.timezones default [], flag: country.flags.png default "" }) }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Country lookup failed: " ++ error.description }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: true, source: "ip-api.com", ipAddress: payload.query default "unknown", location: { country: payload.country default "Unknown", countryCode: payload.countryCode default "XX", region: payload.regionName default "Unknown", city: payload.city default "Unknown", zipCode: payload.zip default "Unknown", latitude: payload.lat default 0, longitude: payload.lon default 0, timezone: payload.timezone default "Unknown" }, network: { isp: payload.isp default "Unknown", org: payload.org default "Unknown", as: payload.as default "Unknown" }, fraudCheck: { note: "Compare claimant's stated location with IP geolocation for fraud indicators", isVPN: false, isProxy: false } }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "Geolocation lookup failed: " ++ error.description }
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "CRM service failed: " ++ error.description }

scatter-gather.doc:name: Fetch user details and posts in parallel

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { success: false, error: "CRM activity fetch failed: " ++ error.description }

db:insert.doc:name: Log API access
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO api_access_log (method, path, remote_addr, user_agent, created_at) VALUES (:method, :path, :remoteAddr, :userAgent, NOW())

db:insert.doc:name: Log error to Audit DB
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO error_log (error_type, error_message, path, created_at) VALUES (:errorType, :errorMessage, :path, NOW())

email:body.email:content:
#["

New Claim Filed

Claim Number: " ++ (vars.claimNumber default "N/A") ++ "

Amount: $" ++ (vars.claimData.claimAmount as String default "0") ++ "

"]

logger.message: No notification configured for this type

http:request.doc:name: Send webhook notification

db:select.doc:name: Get claim for PDF
db:select.db:sql: SELECT c.*, p.policy_number, p.holder_name FROM claims c JOIN policies p ON c.policy_id = p.policy_id WHERE c.claim_id = :claimId

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain --- "INSURANCE CLAIM APPROVAL DOCUMENT
" ++ "==================================

" ++ "Date: " ++ (now() as String {format: "yyyy-MM-dd"}) ++ "
" ++ "Claim Number: " ++ (vars.claimForPdf.claim_number default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "Policy Number: " ++ (vars.claimForPdf.policy_number default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "Policyholder: " ++ (vars.claimForPdf.holder_name default "N/A") ++ "
" ++ "Claimant: " ++ (vars.claimForPdf.claimant_name default "N/A") ++ "

" ++ "Claim Amount: $" ++ (vars.claimForPdf.claim_amount as String default "0") ++ "
" ++ "Approved Amount: $" ++ (vars.statusData.approvedAmount as String default "0") ++ "

" ++ "Status: APPROVED

" ++ "This document confirms the approval of the above insurance claim."

db:insert.doc:name: Record approval document
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO claim_documents (policy_id, claim_id, document_name, document_type, file_path, uploaded_by, uploaded_at) VALUES (:policyId, :claimId, :docName, 'APPROVAL_LETTER', :filePath, 'system', GETDATE())
